## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm test`
- [ ] I ran `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] If package files changed, I ran `npm pack --dry-run`
- [ ] I updated docs (`README.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`, or `TODO.md`) when needed

## Testing Notes

List commands run and key output.

## Screenshots / Logs (if applicable)

Attach UI screenshots or parity/test logs when relevant.
